description_long: This is a rectangular chest of drawers constructed from light-colored wood, featuring a minimalist and modern design. The front face is organized into three rows and five columns, totaling fifteen square drawers, each with a circular cut-out serving as a handle. The sides and back are plain, with no visible hardware or ornamentation, emphasizing the clean lines and natural wood grain. The chest stands on four straight, sturdy legs, with a horizontal support bar connecting the legs at the base. The overall finish is smooth and matte, highlighting the natural texture and color of the wood. This piece is functional and visually neutral, suitable for use in urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or residential entryways.
description: A light wood chest of drawers with fifteen square drawers, each featuring a circular cut-out handle, and a minimalist, modern design on four legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing all fifteen drawers with circular cut-out handles and the full leg structure.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, unadorned wood panel and the depth of the chest.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a completely flat, featureless wooden back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain wood side and leg structure.
